title: Abyssal Baths
description:
You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with [blue]salt[/blue] and something [green]unmistakably organic[/green].

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.

options.title: Immerse
options.description: Gain [green]2[/green] Max HP. Take [red]3[/red] unblockable damage.

options.title: Linger
options.description: Gain [green]2[/green] Max HP. Take [red]4+[/red] unblockable damage (increases by 1 each time).

notes: This event is multi-step. On [green]Immerse[/green]: gain [green]2[/green] Max HP and take [red]3[/red] unblockable, unpowered damage. The damage then permanently increases by [red]1[/red] for each subsequent Linger. On the first [green]Linger[/green] you take [red]4[/red] damage, then [red]5[/red], [red]6[/red], and so on. Each Linger still grants [green]2[/green] Max HP. If the next Linger would reduce your HP to 0 or below, a death warning is shown — but you can still choose to Linger at that point (and die). You can Linger up to 9 times total after the initial Immerse (the escalating flavor text cycles through 9 stages). [green]Abstain[/green] immediately ends the event with a heal and no combat damage.
